title: Angraecopsis thouarsii
taxonomy: Angraecopsis thouarsii is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This classification places it within the order Asparagales. At the family level, Angraecopsis thouarsii is a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae. Further classification at the genus level places it within the genus Angraecopsis. The species Angraecopsis thouarsii is a part of the genus Angraecopsis within the family Orchidaceae.
